arts.ttl: Chelsea recall TWO loanees in January transfer hint
arts.sum: Chelsea have recalled loanees Aaron Anselmino and Gabriel Slonina ahead of the January transfer window. Additionally, Frenchmen Christopher Nkunku and Axel Disasi have been linked with a departure, with the latter perhaps the more likely of the two to leave given that Chelsea were already open to selling him in the summer.

arts.ttl: Why is Ipswich vs Chelsea not on TV? How to watch Premier League match in UK
arts.sum: Ipswich Town are set to face Chelsea at Portman Road in the Premier League - but fans will not be able to watch the game on TV in the UK tonight

arts.ttl: Ranking the top five Chelsea goals in 2024, including Cole Palmer winner and Moises Caicedo screamer
New Chelsea points deduction fear emerges as Premier League decision made
arts.sum: Chelsea face an anxious wait to see if they have satisfied the Premier League's financial rules ahead of a New Year's Eve deadline, according to reports. In the past, these financial deadlines have not been a big issue for clubs but since last season, the Premier League has decided to clamp down on those who may have breached the rules..

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola comment says it all as Chelsea make £16m star available with four others
arts.sum: When asked about the chat while on international duty with England, Chilwell said: "He told me that he thought I was a really talented player and that he wanted me to keep playing well, getting up and down the pitch. In a recent press conference, the Chelsea manager said: "There are players that unfortunately didn't play a lot with us in all the competitions like Chilwell, like Carney.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'make Aaron Anselmino decision' ahead of January window
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly make a decision regarding the status of Aaron Anselmino, the prospect having recently been representing Boca Juniors.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola risks repeating Cole Palmer mistake as Man City youngster eyed for big transfer
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has already suggested that stuttering champions Manchester City could dip into the transfer market this January but sales could also be on the agenda for the side

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer latest amid major Randal Kolo Muani update as Blues' January plans revealed
arts.sum: While the club are long-term admirers of the 21-year-old striker, who has been excellent for the Tractor Boys in their first season back in the Premier League in more than 20 years, a move next month is deemed very unlikely at this stage. Chelsea are not planning to make a move for Paris Saint-Germain forward Randal Kolo Muani in next month's mid-season transfer window, football.london understands.

arts.ttl: Chelsea target blockbuster moves for Premier League duo
arts.sum: Chelsea are interested in Bournemouth duo Dean Huijsen and Ilya Zabarnyi, according to a report. Centre-backs Dean Huijsen and Ilya Zabarnyi, too, are becoming increasingly sought-after commodities.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'make transfer decision' on £78.7m striker as Enzo Maresca's January plan revealed
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly decide whether to press ahead with a deal for Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani in the January transfer window.
